name: Livanis Publications SA
summary: Livanis Publications SA operates as a publishing company in Lebanon. The company publishes books, educational CD-ROMs, magazines, and commercial software applications, as well as provides feasibility studies and Internet services. It offers educational books, as well as books in the areas of literature, political economy, children, sciences, psychology, and various other issues. Livanis Publications SA was founded in 1972 and is based in Athens, Greece.
